title: 这条 prompt 详细描述了如何制作一张具有浓厚新艺术风格的希腊神话信息图海报，适合用于文化展览、教育推广或高端礼品市场等中文营销场景。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 详细描述了如何制作一张具有浓厚新艺术风格的希腊神话信息图海报，适合用于文化展览、教育推广或高端礼品市场等中文营销场景。
prompt_original: An Art Nouveau style historical infographic poster in 16:9 horizontal format about Greek mythology, featuring an elegant flowing composition inspired by classical decorative poster design, with ornate floral borders, curling vines, golden laurel motifs, and graceful asymmetrical linework; the central artwork should depict the Olympian family tree as a beautiful mythic tableau with Zeus, Hera, Athena, Apollo, Artemis, Poseidon, and Aphrodite arranged in a ceremonial vertical hierarchy around Mount Olympus, each god or goddess framed by stylized Art Nouveau halos, flowing hair, marble columns, peacocks, olive branches, stars, waves, and moon crescents, all drawn with elongated elegant contours and rich decorative detail; use a palette of deep teal, antique gold, cream, and muted rose, with subtle gradients only in the illustrated figures and background sky; place the title at the top in large ornamental serif lettering reading GREEK MYTHOLOGY, with the subtitle THE OLYMPIAN FAMILY TREE beneath it in smaller elegant text; organize the facts into decorative side panels with graceful curved frames and thin gold rules, including sections labeled ORIGINS, GODS OF OLYMPUS, SYMBOLS, POWERS, HEROES, and LEGACY, plus a small DID YOU KNOW? box near the lower corner with five original myth facts; the entire poster should feel luxurious, classical, poetic, and richly decorative, with no modern UI, no copyrighted artwork, and a true Art Nouveau atmosphere, 16:9 horizontal ratio
prompt_zh: 一幅16:9横版的新艺术风格历史信息图海报，主题是希腊神话。构图优雅流畅，灵感来源于古典装饰性海报设计，带有华丽的花卉边框、卷曲的藤蔓、金色月桂花环图案和优美的不对称线条。中央的艺术作品应描绘奥林匹斯家族树，作为美丽的神话场景，其中宙斯、赫拉、雅典娜、阿波罗、阿尔忒弥斯、波塞冬和阿佛洛狄特围绕着奥林匹斯山以仪式性的垂直层次排列，每位神祇或女神周围都有新艺术风格的光环、飘逸的头发、大理石柱、孔雀、橄榄枝、星星、海浪和月牙形图案，所有图案都用细长优雅的轮廓和丰富的装饰细节绘制；使用深青色、古金色、奶油色和柔和的玫瑰色调色板，仅在插图人物和背景天空中使用微妙的渐变；标题放在顶部，用大号装饰性的衬线字体写着“希腊神话”，副标题“奥林匹斯家族树”用较小的优雅文字写在下方；将事实组织成装饰性的侧边栏，有优美的曲线框架和细金线，包括标有“起源”、“奥林匹斯诸神”、“象征”、“力量”、“英雄”和“遗产”的部分，以及靠近下角的一个小“你知道吗？”框，包含五个原创神话事实；整个海报应该感觉奢华、古典、诗意且装饰丰富，没有现代用户界面，没有版权艺术品，并具有真正的新艺术风格氛围，比例为16:9横版。
